section.heading: National planning and education
section.chapeau: The Secretary shall, to the extent practicable—

paragraph.content: include in national planning frameworks the threat of an EMP or GMD event; and
conduct outreach to educate owners and operators of critical infrastructure, emergency planners, and emergency response providers at all levels of government regarding threats of EMP and GMD.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 107–296, title V, § 527, as added Pub. L. 114–328, div. A, title XIX, § 1913(a)(4), Dec. 23, 2016, 130 Stat. 2686.)
